_comment: Specialized-chunk distribution. Edit + /reload to retune (no recompile). 'chance' = odds a chunk of that biome category is special (0..1). 'weights' = relative odds of each resource within that category (any positive numbers; need not sum to anything). Animal resources are now ONLY HORSES + FISH (cow/pig/sheep/chicken spawn naturally everywhere and are NOT chunk-typed). Resource names: HORSES, FISH, COPPER, IRON, COAL, MARBLE, TIN, WHEAT, CARROT, BEETROOT, POTATO, STONE, LIMESTONE, ANDESITE, DIORITE, GRANITE, CLAY, SAND (the crop resources are dry-farmland crop chunks; stone/limestone/clay/sand are digger material deposits; coal is a miner ore boulder; andesite/diorite/granite are low-value 'red herring' stone deposits that read as special on the scout map). 'max_relief' = max ground-height spread across a chunk before it's considered too steep to be special.
